level_1_instant_removal: Harassment or personal attacks on individuals
level_2_warning_then_removal: Stock market manipulation or financial scams
level_3_moderation_review: Conspiracy theories unrelated to combat sports
Adult content (permitted if educational, flagged as mature)

comment_moderation.approval_threshold: All comments pre-approved before display on official posts

inappropriate_tags: Spam tag chains (>5 tags per sentence)
post_tagging.verification: Verify tagged accounts are legitimate before engagement

sharing_policy.external_sharing: Allowed; link back to DFC platform
sharing_policy.content_ownership: Users retain rights; DFC gets usage license

health_claims.rule: Any medical/health claims must cite peer-reviewed sources or licensed professionals
health_claims.flag_threshold: Posts claiming to cure injuries or diseases without evidence
health_claims.action: Labeled as 'unverified' or removed if false

fighter_statistics.rule: Record stats pulled from official sanctioning bodies or verified databases
fighter_statistics.action: Fact-checked against: UFC.com, BoxRec, Sherdog, OneFC official records

event_information.rule: Event dates, venues, and ticket links must match official promoter announcements
event_information.flag_threshold: Conflicting dates or fraudulent ticket links
event_information.action: Removed; user warned; repeated violations = account suspension

gold_checkmark.tier_2: High-profile promoters (UFC, PFL, Bellator, major boxing orgs)

user_appeal_process.step_1: User receives removal/suspension notice with specific reason
user_appeal_process.step_2: User submits appeal via help center within 72 hours

moderation_team.training: Monthly training on combat sports knowledge, sensitivity, bias detection

transparency_reports.frequency: Monthly public reports (first of each month)
includes: Removals by category (health, spam, harassment, etc.)

self_promotion.limit: Maximum 1 promotional post per 5 regular posts
self_promotion.definition: Content primarily designed to sell/direct users away from platform

affiliate_linking.requirement: Disclose affiliate relationships with '#ad' or '#sponsored' tags

multi_level_marketing.policy: MLM and pyramid scheme promotion prohibited

alternative_medicine.stance: Supported as complementary health approach (NOT replacement for medical care)
alternative_medicine.example_approved: Ice bath recovery protocols from recovery specialists

athlete_mental_health.vigilance: Posts discussing depression/anxiety flagged for support resources
athlete_mental_health.resources: Crisis hotlines available in DFC help center

special_cases.news_outlets: Hold to higher accuracy standards; auto-suspend on repeated misinformation
special_cases.combat_athletes: Protected category; harassment/abuse receives enhanced penalties
special_cases.minors: Content not indexed in public search; private messaging limited
special_cases.verified_medical_professionals: Can post health content with minimal moderation (source verification only)

prohibition: Publishing others' medical records without consent
Leaked training data or fight strategy

live_event_engagement.during_events: Real-time updates encouraged; moderation in peak mode
live_event_engagement.spoiler_policy: Live results marked with 'SPOILER: [EVENT NAME]' for first 24 hours

fightier_centric_protections.rank_manipulation: Posts falsely claiming fighter ranking improvement → removed + warning
fightier_centric_protections.record_inflation: Claiming unverified fight record → fact-checked against official databases
fightier_centric_protections.career_defamation: Malicious false claims about fighter history → removed + potential legal referral
